parameters.query:
SELECT
  id,
  content,
  platform,
  approved_at
FROM approved_posts
ORDER BY approved_at DESC
LIMIT 10;

parameters.query: SELECT * FROM approved_content WHERE content_id = '{{ $json.content_id }}' AND media_type = 'image' LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM approved_content WHERE content_id = '{{ $json.content_id }}' AND media_type = 'video' LIMIT 1
UPDATE approved_content SET status = 'published', published_date = NOW() WHERE content_id = '{{ $json.content_id }}'

INSERT INTO conversation_memory (
  session_id,
  user_id,
  role,
  content,
  metadata,
  created_at
)
VALUES (
  '{{ $("Initialize/Update Session").first().json.session_id }}',
  'dimba_system',
  'user',
  'Daily diabetes content generation request',
  '{"trigger": "daily_schedule", "timestamp": "{{ $now.toISO() }}"}'::jsonb,
  NOW()
)
RETURNING *;

-- Memory: Retrieve conversation history
SELECT 
  role,
  content,
  created_at,
  metadata
FROM conversation_memory
WHERE session_id = '{{ $json.session_id }}'
  AND created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'
ORDER BY created_at ASC
LIMIT 20;

-- RAG: Semantic search for relevant knowledge
SELECT 
  topic,
  content,
  source,
  metadata
FROM agent_knowledge
WHERE 
  (content ILIKE '%' || '{{ $json.user_message }}' || '%'
   OR topic ILIKE '%' || '{{ $json.user_message }}' || '%')
  AND status = 'active'
ORDER BY updated_at DESC
LIMIT 10;

-- Store governance decision log
INSERT INTO governance_logs (
  session_id,
  user_message,
  risk_level,
  status,
  violations,
  warnings,
  decision_timestamp
)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.session_id }}',
  '{{ $json.user_message }}',
  '{{ $json.governance.riskLevel }}',
  '{{ $json.governance.status }}',
  ARRAY[{{ $json.governance.violations.map(v => `'${v}'`).join(',') }}]::text[],
  ARRAY[{{ $json.governance.warnings.map(w => `'${w}'`).join(',') }}]::text[],
  NOW()
)
RETURNING *;

INSERT INTO conversation_memory (
  session_id,
  user_id,
  role,
  content,
  metadata,
  created_at
)
VALUES (
  '{{ $("Initialize/Update Session").first().json.session_id }}',
  'dimba_system',
  'assistant',
  '{{ $json.caption }}',
  '{
    "content_type": "{{ $json.content_type }}",
    "key_message": "{{ $json.key_message }}",
    "image_prompt": "{{ $json.image_prompt }}",
    "generation_source": "{{ $json.generation_source }}"
  }'::jsonb,
  NOW()
)
RETURNING *;
